name: Web Search
description: Fetches up-to-date information from the web before answering time-sensitive questions.
systemPrompt: When the user asks about recent events, prices, news, or anything that may have changed since your training cutoff, call the web_search tool first and cite your sources inline.
body:
## Workflow
1. Identify the user's information need.
2. Call web_search with a focused query.
3. Read the top 3 results.
4. Synthesize an answer and cite sources as numbered references.
